# UniCan

> UniCan is an AI content platform for creators. Generate images, video, lip sync, and scheduled automations from one workspace.

## Core pages

- [Automations](https://unican.app/automations): Schedule AI agents to generate, post, or iterate on a cron schedule.
- [Image generation](https://unican.app/image): Multiple image models with style and composition control.
- [Video](https://unican.app/video): Text-to-video and image-to-video.
- [Lip sync](https://unican.app/lipsync): Match audio to a face with timing control.
- [Motion copy](https://unican.app/motion-copy): Transfer motion from a reference video to a still.
- [Image editing](https://unican.app/inpaint): Inpaint and regional edits.
- [Canvas](https://unican.app/canvases): Node-based workflows you can rerun.
- [Autopost](https://unican.app/autopost): Connect Instagram and publish on schedule.
- [Free tools](https://unican.app/free-tools): Local utilities for metadata removal and asset compression.
- [Pricing](https://unican.app/pricing): Plans and limits.

## About

Type: WebApplication
Category: AI content creation
Audience: Creators, marketers, small teams
Language: en
